allow: PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\QLCT\\src\\applications\\Main\\screens\\Transaction\\TransactionScreen.tsx'; $lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\($path, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $before = $lines[0..1768]; $replacement = @\('', '      <EditDebtModal', '        debt={editDebtTarget}', '        onClose={\(\) => setEditDebtTarget\(null\)}', '      />'\); $after = $lines[1866..\($lines.Length - 1\)]; $new = $before + $replacement + $after; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\($path, $new, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Output \('Lines after: ' + $new.Length\))
